meta.name: QVL Mobile Leader Brain
meta.description: The intelligence node for the QVL Mobile application. This brain focuses on dashboard views, user account management, and mobile-specific agent interactions.

changelog.note: Initial mobile brain setup. Derived from AXON-PRIME. Optimized for Expo/React Native architecture.

build_instructions.styling: Install NativeWind and configure tailwind.config.js for Cyan/Space Blue theme
build_instructions.auth_integration: Install @stack-auth/react-native and wrap the root layout with StackProvider
build_instructions.theme_sync: Synchronize 'glass-panel' and 'vector-glow' aesthetics using NativeWind utilities

core_screens.name: Splash
core_screens.purpose: Initial brand loading and identity verification

core_screens.name: Onboarding
core_screens.purpose: 3-slide introduction to Neural Horizon, Context-Awareness, and Planetary Scale

core_screens.name: Login/Auth
core_screens.purpose: Secure entry via Stack Auth (Email/Password + OAuth)

core_screens.name: Dashboard (Home)
core_screens.purpose: Real-time API usage, recent AI activities, and account status

current_state.focus: Generate initial Expo screens based on mobile-brain blueprints
pending_decisions: Confirm mobile-specific OAuth redirect URLs in Stack Auth dashboard
Finalize dashboard chart library for React Native (e.g., Victory or Gifted Charts)
blockers: Mobile project environment not yet initialized
current_state.notes: The mobile app is a carbon copy of the web dashboard logic with a simplified mobile-first UI.

agents.name: Qualifier
rules: Ensure touch targets are at least 44x44dp
Flag complex UI patterns that should be simplified for mobile

execution_rules: The UI must feel 'alive' with subtle animations
Maintain the Space Blue / Cyan color palette strictly

features: Real-time push notifications for AXON events
